goal_text:
You are traveling to Cambridge and looking forward to try local restaurants.
You are looking for a place to dine. The restaurant should be in the 'expensive' price range and should be in the 'centre'.
Make sure you get 'food type' and 'phone number'.
You are also looking for a 'train'. The train should go to 'leicester' and should depart from 'cambridge'.
The train should leave on 'saturday' and should 'arrive by 16:00'.
Make sure you get 'travel time' and 'departure time'.Remember. You don't want booking for restaurant. Just get the information and it all done.
Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are traveling to Cambridge and looking forward to try local restaurants
You are looking for a place to dine. The restaurant should be in the expensive price range and should be in the centre
Make sure you get food type and phone number
You are also looking for a train. The train should go to leicester and should depart from cambridge
The train should leave on saturday and should arrive by 16:00
Make sure you get travel time and departure time
